heroSubtitle: AI-powered support for financial services. Get instant answers on accounts, billing, claims, and compliance — without the wait.
howItWorksNote: Click the chat widget in the bottom right to try it out.

questions.title: Consumer Support
items: I was charged twice for the same transaction. How do I request a refund, and how long will it take to get my money back?
There's a charge on my account I don't recognize. What steps should I take to dispute it?
The bank is asking me to verify my identity before completing a payment. Why is this happening, and what do I need to do?
How do I update my saved card or payment method on my account?
I want to cancel my subscription. Will I lose access immediately, and what happens to my billing history?

questions.title: Business & Operations
items: How does your company handle PCI-DSS compliance, and what are my responsibilities as a merchant?
How do I manage user roles and permissions for my team in the Dashboard?
What happens when a subscription payment fails? How do you handle recovery?
How do I verify my business identity to enable live payments and payouts?
How can I monitor my payment operations and get notified about key events like failed payouts or disputes?

problems.title: Account Access Gridlock
problems.pain: Locked accounts, forgotten passwords, and expired sessions generate the highest volume of support contacts in financial services. Customers hit dead ends when credentials don't match or multi-factor authentication fails — and every failed login is a potential churn event.
successCriteria: Account access queries (password resets, MFA failures, session expiry) resolved autonomously without human intervention.
Tier-1 ticket volume for access issues reduced by 60%+ within 90 days.
Average resolution time for access tickets drops from hours to under 2 minutes.
CSAT for self-service account recovery reaches 80%+.
problems.proof: A leading fintech processing 2M+ queries/year used Computer to achieve a 70% AI resolution rate — deployed across 100% of customer segments in just 15 weeks.

problems.title: Claims & Dispute Maze
problems.pain: Policyholders and banking customers struggle to file claims, locate the right department, and track resolution status. Multi-step processes lead to abandonment and repeat contacts — each handoff eroding trust and increasing cost.
successCriteria: Dispute intake completed in a single AI-led conversation, with automatic case creation and routing to the fraud or risk team.
Average handoffs per claim reduced from 3–5 to 1 or fewer.
Customers receive proactive status updates without needing to re-contact support.
Fraud-related tickets automatically triaged with full transaction history attached, reducing investigation time from days to hours.
problems.proof: Computer's fraud investigation capability connects tickets to session replays, transaction logs, and prior case history — reducing investigation time from days to hours.

problems.title: Billing & Payment Confusion
problems.pain: Users can't find where to make a payment, don't understand a charge on their statement, or need to update a funding source. Support teams field the same billing questions daily — questions that have known answers but no scalable delivery mechanism.
successCriteria: "Where is my money?" and payment status queries resolved autonomously using live transaction data — no agent required.
Billing-related inbound chat volume reduced by 50%+.
Computer triggers real-time actions (e.g. enabling a currency, updating a payment method) directly from the conversation.
Repeat contacts for the same billing question drop to near zero.
problems.proof: In the Maple financial services playground, Computer retrieves a customer's full transaction history, identifies the issue, and triggers automations (like enabling EUR payments) — all within a single chat session.

problems.title: Onboarding Abandonment
problems.pain: New customers drop off during enrollment when asked for identity verification, funding methods, or document uploads they didn't expect. Each abandoned application costs acquisition spend — and the customer is lost before they've even started.
successCriteria: Onboarding drop-off rate reduced by 30%+ through real-time AI guidance at friction points (document upload, identity check, e-sign).
KYC and account verification queries answered instantly, 24/7, without agent involvement.
Incomplete applications detected proactively, with Computer prompting customers to resume.
Time to complete onboarding reduced by 40%+.
problems.proof: The BFSI executive brief identifies onboarding funnel drop-off as a top use case — Computer identifies exactly where users abandon (e.g. document upload, eligibility check) and correlates with support ticket spikes to close the gap.

problems.title: Compliance Documentation Sprawl
problems.pain: Internal teams spend hours locating the right policy document, audit checklist, or regulatory FAQ across scattered wikis and shared drives. Slow answers hurt regulators and customers alike — and in financial services, a delayed compliance response carries real risk.
successCriteria: Average time to locate a compliance document reduced from 12 minutes to under 60 seconds.
100% of policy, audit, and regulatory content searchable through a single conversational interface.
Computer surfaces source-cited responses so teams can verify and trust the answer.
Reduction in escalations caused by agents giving inconsistent or outdated policy guidance.
problems.proof: Computer's knowledge graph consolidates product documentation, historical support data, and system-of-record context into a single searchable intelligence layer — customers and agents retrieve precise, contextual responses in seconds.

problems.title: Integration & Permissions Bottlenecks
problems.pain: IT administrators manually provision user roles, configure API connections, and troubleshoot data-sync failures between core banking, CRM, and payment platforms. Every delay cascades downstream — and 70% of escalations trace back to configuration issues that should never have reached a human.
successCriteria: Config-related escalations reduced by 60%+ through AI-guided self-service for role provisioning and integration troubleshooting.
IT ticket volume for access and permissions requests reduced by 40–60% (L1 deflection target).
Computer connects to 50+ tools (Salesforce, Jira, Slack, core banking systems) with bidirectional sync — eliminating manual data-reconciliation tasks.
Mean time to resolve integration incidents reduced by 50%+.
problems.proof: Computer's AirSync connects 50+ enterprise tools with bidirectional, real-time sync. The BFSI brief highlights ITSM consolidation as a top use case — replacing fragmented tools with a single AI-native platform that connects IT incidents to customer impact in real time.
